category_name: International Accounting, Provider Change and Recovery
service_group: International Accounting, Group Reporting, Provider Change and Recovery

services.name: English-Language Accounting and Group Reporting
services.description: Accounting and reporting in English for foreign shareholders, Romanian subsidiaries and group headquarters.

services.name: Cross-Border VAT, OSS and IOSS Accounting
services.description: Cross-border VAT accounting, OSS/IOSS support and international invoicing procedures for EU and non-EU clients.

services.name: Transfer Pricing File Support
services.description: Support for identifying intragroup transactions and preparing Romanian transfer pricing documentation.

services.name: Romanian GAAP to IFRS Group Reporting
services.description: Mapping Romanian local accounting statements to IFRS or internal group reporting templates.

services.name: All-in-One Company Setup, Accounting, Payroll and ANAF Representation
services.description: Complete package for foreign entrepreneurs: Romanian company setup, fiscal registrations, accounting, payroll and ANAF representation.

services.name: Accounting Provider Change
services.description: Transition support for changing accounting provider, including file handover, accounting review and initial risk check.

services.name: Second Opinion Accounting Review
services.description: Independent accounting second opinion for clients concerned about accuracy, delays or quality of their current accountant.

services.name: Accounting and Tax Health Check
services.description: Internal accounting and tax health-check for SMEs to identify compliance risks and accounting issues.

services.name: Forensic Accounting
services.description: Forensic accounting analysis for suspected fraud, large financial discrepancies and reconstruction of financial flows.

services.name: Digital Accounting and ERP Integration
services.description: Digital accounting workflows integrated with invoicing software and ERP systems used by SMEs.
